title: corylus maxima
intro: Corylus maxima, also known as the filbert or large-leaved hazel, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its broad, flat leaves and edible nuts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Corylus maxima include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The nuts and leaves of the plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed fresh or dried for later use.
